content.text: [System] Before completing your task, you MUST call the submit_output tool with your structured results. The tool's schema defines the required output format. You can do all your work first (code, analysis, file creation), then call submit_output as your final action to report your structured results.

_completion_bullets: Reviewed assistant message writing autocapture extension spec
Checked technical claims (Chrome MV3 webRequest, fetch cookie visibility) against domain knowledge, found consistent
Confirmed no numeric/citation claims requiring cross-check with tool output in window

Noted promised JS-redactor verification and brief (b) not shown completed in window, but claim was prospective ('let me... then verify'), not an assertion of completed action, and no kernel activity contradicts it — not flagged per rubric
No artifacts saved or exec-log activity in this window to cross-check
Found no contradicted values, unsound methods, or fabricated external references
